description: Multiple high-entropy blobs combining random-looking data with binary embedding - multi-indicator detection test

primary_detection.name: Combined High Entropy + Binary Embedding
primary_detection.description: Random-looking binary blobs that decode to shell scripts and executable code - combines multiple entropy indicators
indicators: SHELL_BLOB: Byte array that decodes to bash script
HYBRID_PAYLOAD: Base64 with embedded ELF and commands
RANDOM_HEX_BLOB: Hex dump with random padding

ENTROPY-001.name: High Entropy Strings
ENTROPY-001.description: Strings with entropy >6.0 bits per character

underlying_threats.name: Shell Script Dropper
underlying_threats.description: SHELL_BLOB decodes to curl | bash pipeline

underlying_threats.name: Hybrid Binary/Script
underlying_threats.description: HYBRID_PAYLOAD contains ELF header + embedded awk command

underlying_threats.name: Multi-Layer Encoding
underlying_threats.description: LAYERED_BLOB requires base64 decode + zlib decompress

underlying_threats.name: Hex-Encoded Backdoor
underlying_threats.description: RANDOM_HEX_BLOB decodes to wget backdoor installer

verdict_reasoning: Comprehensive malware sample combining multiple entropy and binary indicators: XOR encryption, base64+zlib layering, hex encoding with random padding, binary embedding. All decode to malicious payloads (backdoors, reverse shells, droppers)
recommended_actions: Detect byte arrays with shell script patterns (#!/bin/bash)
Identify XOR encryption by entropy + repetitive patterns
Scan for multi-layer encoding (base64 containing zlib)
Detect hex strings with high-entropy padding
Block any code calculating its own entropy (anti-analysis)
Flag files with multiple high-entropy blobs
